sources.name: H2+ reference potential energy curve and its derivative
sources.version: minimal-basis LCAO-MO, zeta = 1, 401 points on [0.15, 20] bohr
sources.acquisition: Generated analytically in-repo by h2plus_model.py; no external electronic-structure package or dataset is required.
sources.exclusion_reason: Not excluded; the generator is committed and the curve is reproduced on demand.
